title: The Truth About Oden
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on the truth about oden within the Dog and Cat Remember Oden storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An emergency situation grave enough to shake the entire country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It looks like Kinemon and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: made it onto the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All three of us dozed off, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: This entire country, the mokomo duke- dom, was almost razed to the ground...

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: Because of Raizo! A Samurai they'd never even seen or heard of!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If they happened to meet Samuel...

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: Looking for that very same raizou,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no way that they'd let them off easy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We really have to find those two and stop them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: (a) [2] In section,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: By the way, is it just me, or is someone ringing a bell?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's Bariete's Bell!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Samurai- Gosaru!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is bad- Gosaru!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Samurai have come- gosaru!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Right belly fortress

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke Inuarashi! Barie's ringing the town bells!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes. I know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're going to the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: those of you that can move, come with me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Y... Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That Bell is quite clamorous indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Perhaps its purpose is to announce the arrival of guests.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're welcoming us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: could be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But didn't law- Dono make it clear that those "human-hating" tribes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Living on you were none other than the Minks them- selves?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes... I wonder if that is an old rumor or a more recent one.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kan- JURO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Kanjuro! So you're okay after all!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: YES! I'm sorry for making you worry! Why are you out here by yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are Luffy- Dono and the others!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I guess ever since I set foot on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've been feeling a bit uneasy...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: I was resting alone in my room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I see. That's rough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the heck is going on!? Why am I sprinting so early in the morning!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kinemon! And, what was his name...

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Kanjuro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Anyway, the whole country's in an uproar right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's news that two Samural have appeared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, so we're gonna have an- other banquet! consecutive banquets are awesome.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No, you idiot! We're gonna have big trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me!? These guys all were at Death's door...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: because someone thought that a Samurai was on this island!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Right now, Master Nekoma- Mushi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is headed for town with the entire army in tow!

summary: The Truth About Oden: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
